title: Katapult to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
author: Na
description: Katapult Holdings (NASDAQ: KPLT) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026 before market open. The company will not host a conference call due to its pending merger with The Aaron's Company and CCF Holdings LLC. Financial materials will be available on the Katapult Investor Relations website.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a routine earnings release notification with no conference call due to pending merger activity. No financial performance data or forward guidance is provided to indicate positive or negative sentiment.

title: Katapult to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on March 11, 2026
author: Na
description: Katapult Holdings (NASDAQ: KPLT), an e-commerce fintech company specializing in lease-to-own solutions for non-prime consumers, announced it will release its 2025 financial results on March 11, 2026. The company has entered into a definitive agreement to combine with The Aaron's Company and CCF Holdings LLC in an all-stock transaction. No conference call will be held due to the pending merger.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is factual regarding financial results release and merger proceedings. While mergers can be positive long-term, the neutral tone of the announcement and lack of conference call discussion suggests a procedural update rather than positive or negative news.

title: BRODSKY & SMITH SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: Notifying Investors of the Following Investigations: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. (NYSE - CWAN), Katapult Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq - KPLT), Janus Henderson Group plc (NYSE - JHG), Amicus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq - FOLD)
author: Brodsky & Smith
description: Law firm Brodsky & Smith has initiated investigations into four major merger transactions, examining whether company boards breached fiduciary duties by failing to conduct fair processes and provide fair value to shareholders. The investigations involve Clearwater Analytics ($24.55/share), Katapult Holdings (6% ownership in combined entity), Janus Henderson ($49.00/share), and Amicus Therapeutics ($14.50/share).

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties regarding fair process and deal consideration fairness in $8.4 billion acquisition
Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties; shareholders will own only 6% of combined entity, suggesting potentially unfavorable deal terms

title: Katapult Stock Jumps After Aaron's And CCF Agree To All Stock Merger
author: Akanksha Bakshi
description: Katapult Holdings announced an all-stock merger with Aaron's and CCF Holdings, creating a national omnichannel platform serving non-prime consumers. The deal will result in Katapult shareholders owning 6% of the combined company, with expected annual revenue over $4 billion.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock surged 24.09% in premarket trading due to strategic merger that expands market reach and potential revenue

title: Katapult, The Aaron’s Company, and CCF Holdings to Combine in All-Stock Transaction
author: Katapult Holdings, Inc.
description: Katapult Holdings, Inc. has entered into an all-stock transaction with Aaron's and CCF Holdings to create an integrated financial solutions and omni-channel retail platform for non-prime consumers, aiming to enhance growth potential and provide comprehensive financial services.
